gate_plan.goal: Close answer-label leakage beyond observed rows.
required_tests: construct non-realized candidate universe using law features only
test whether slot/C law predicts A/B without role_class, label, shared_B, reverse_partner, accepted/exact fields
run shuffle/null audits against target A/B assignments
verify no downstream answer labels are required
gate_plan.why_next: The candidate is admitted only because no leakage was detected on observed rows. Leakage is explicitly not closed.

gate_plan.goal: Generalize from observed rows to a universal or bounded-domain A/B law.
required_tests: define the domain where from_slot, to_slot, from_C, to_C are valid source inputs
enumerate all admissible slot/C keys in that domain
show generated A/B outputs match observed rows and reject invalid rows
state whether the law is universal, domain-bounded, or observed-row-only
gate_plan.why_next: Observed-row exactness does not prove the law beyond the observed row universe.

gate_plan.goal: Tie the slot/C hand to native WXYZTI chamber anatomy.
required_tests: map slot/C hand signatures to WXYZTI chamber roles
respect user-declared orientation t=input and I=output without promoting it to theorem
separate WXYZ side faces from TI polar path/null socket
test whether hand signatures are stable under permissible orientation relabelings
gate_plan.why_next: The current chirality reading is strong but still candidate-level. It needs a chamber-anatomy source account.

gate_plan.goal: Derive full role-labeled shared_B universe without using answer labels as source.
required_tests: generate shared_B candidates from slot/C A/B law plus source fields
bind station_role and role_pair without role_class leakage
recover shared_B/reverse_partner split as output rather than input
compare generated universe to observed accepted universe
gate_plan.why_next: A/B surface alone does not produce the full role-labeled shared_B universe.

gate_plan.goal: Only consider Gap A closure after all prior gates produce receipts.
required_tests: verify G1 through G4 receipts exist and pass
audit whether source law is admitted
audit whether native generator is admitted
audit whether Gap A closes without adding hidden assumptions
gate_plan.why_next: Gap A closure requires source law, leakage closure, bounded A/B law, chirality account, and shared_B universe derivation.

immediate_next.reason: Do not generalize or promote chirality until leakage is closed or a stronger boundary is recorded.

keeper_line: The candidate is admitted at the surface; the remaining gates decide whether it becomes law.
